SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2012 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, WB COYLE DBA DANILO DESIGN GROUP, L.P., IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
